title: Community Moderation Update
body: Today's moderation actions: 1) Banned spam_wave_42 for posting phishing links across multiple channels. 2) Banned toxic_runner for repeated harassment against newcomers. 3) Issued warnings to trusted_helper and bot_like_user_77 for conduct issues. 4) Dismissed false positive report against core_maintainer. All reports have been processed and closed. Please continue to report violations to keep our community safe.
